steps.t: Lân Mefam is located east of Bâr Húrin. You should destroy Mûmak feed bags at Lân Mefam. Destroying them should make the Mûmakil hungry, restless, and…
Lân Mefam is located east of Bâr Húrin. You should destroy Mûmak feed bags at Lân Mefam. Destroying them should make the Mûmakil hungry, restless, and…
